case_title: DEANDRA BRYANT VS. RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) THEODORE ELLINGTON APPEARING AS REPRESENTATIVE OF DEFENDANT RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE FILED BY DEFENDANT RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BRYANT, DEANDRA RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRYANT, DEANDRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.(WAIVED) SERVED OCT-31-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRYANT, DEANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE $3,980.98 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,980.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BRYANT, DEANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT RUTH WILLIAMS BAYVIEW OPERA HOUSE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.
